name: Added Fire Damage
description: Adds fire damage to attacks and spells

name: Spell Echo
description: Supported spells repeat once with reduced damage

name: Critical Strikes
description: Increases critical strike chance significantly

name: Chain
description: Projectiles chain to additional targets

name: Fork
description: Projectiles fork into additional projectiles

name: Increased Area
description: Increases area of effect radius

name: Vicious Strikes
description: Increases damage with bleed and poison effects

name: Minion Damage
description: Increases damage of summoned minions

name: Multicast
description: Spells cast additional times

name: Increased Duration
description: Increases duration of spell effects

name: Added Cold Damage
description: Adds cold damage to attacks and spells

name: Added Lightning Damage
description: Adds lightning damage to attacks and spells

name: Added Chaos Damage
description: Adds chaos damage to attacks and spells

name: Faster Attacks
description: Increases attack speed

name: Faster Casting
description: Increases casting speed

name: Increased Critical Strikes
description: Increases critical strike chance

name: Power Charge On Crit
description: Gain power charges on critical strikes

name: Bloodlust
description: Supported attacks deal more damage to bleeding enemies

name: Elemental Proliferation
description: elemental effects spread to nearby enemies

name: Melee Physical Damage
description: Increases melee physical damage

name: Iron Grip
description: Projectile attacks gain base physical damage based on strength

name: Chain
description: Projectiles chain to nearby enemies

name: Close Combatants
description: Deal more damage to nearby enemies

name: Swift Affliction
description: Increases damage of damaging ailments

name: Efficacy
description: Increases damage and duration of spells

name: Arson
description: Enemies ignited by supported spells explode

name: Unstable
description: Supported spells have increased critical strike chance but can critically fail

name: Innervation
description: Gain life on kill with supported skills

name: Soul Thief
description: Gain mana on kill with supported skills
